description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical porcelain vase featuring intricate hand-painted scenes in a traditional Chinese style. The surface is adorned with a continuous narrative illustration, depicting a procession of figures in colorful robes, some holding banners and parasols, with a large dragon and trees in the background. The artwork is rendered in soft hues of green, red, blue, and orange, with delicate linework and subtle shading. The rim and base are unadorned, emphasizing the detailed central artwork. The vase has a smooth, glossy finish, typical of glazed porcelain, and appears to be hollow inside. Its overall appearance suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for display in refined urban or cultural settings.
description: A tall, cylindrical porcelain vase with detailed hand-painted Chinese procession scenes and a glossy, smooth finish.
description_view_0: This view highlights the dragon motif and a group of figures beneath a large tree, with the narrative scene beginning to wrap around the vase.
description_view_1: This angle shows a pavilion structure with seated figures and more participants in the procession, emphasizing architectural elements.
description_view_2: This side focuses on the dense gathering of figures, many holding parasols and banners, with less visible background scenery.
description_view_3: This view returns to the dragon motif, showing the continuation of the procession and the transition back to the starting scene.
attribute_pattern: figural procession with dragon and pavilion motifs
